title: euchiton umbricola
intro: Euchiton umbricola, also known as tree daisy or New Zealand tree daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in New Zealand for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The leaves and flowers of Euchiton umbricola can be used in herbal preparations, often infused in teas or applied topically as a salve or ointment.
